title: Aegis Role
description: A scoped role definition for an agent operating in this workspace. Think of this as a job description: it tells an agent exactly what it is responsible for, what it can access, and how it should operate. Every agent entering the workspace is assigned a role — either the default role or a named specialist role.

$schema.description: Reference to the Aegis role schema for validation.

version.description: Aegis schema version this file conforms to.

role.description: Identity and purpose of this role.

purpose.description: What this role is responsible for. The one-sentence job description.
examples: Full-scope development across the entire codebase.
Frontend development including UI components, pages, and client-side state.
Backend API development, database interactions, and business logic.

specialization.description: Areas of expertise this role is expected to bring. Helps agents calibrate their depth of knowledge application.

scope.description: The operational boundaries for this role. Overrides global governance permissions with role-specific access.

primary_paths.description: Glob patterns for paths this role owns and may freely modify.

secondary_paths.description: Paths this role may read and occasionally modify when directly relevant to a task, but does not own.

excluded_paths.description: Paths this role must never touch, even if global governance allows access.

autonomy_overrides.description: Role-specific overrides to the global autonomy settings. A senior/trusted role might get more autonomy; a narrow specialist might get less.

convention_overrides.description: Role-specific overrides to global conventions. References convention IDs from governance.json.

convention_id.description: The ID of the global convention being overridden.

override.description: Fields to override. Only specified fields are changed; others inherit from the global convention.

collaboration.description: How this role interacts with other roles in a multi-agent workflow.

depends_on.description: Role names this role depends on. Work from these roles may need to complete before this role can proceed.

provides_to.description: Role names that depend on this role's output.

shared_resources.description: Resources that multiple roles access. Defines access protocol to prevent conflicts.

protocol.description: append_only: May add but not modify existing content. read_only: May read but not modify. coordinate: Must check ledger for locks before modifying. owns: This role has primary write authority.

handoff.description: How this role signals completion and passes work to dependent roles.

signal_method.description: How the agent signals task completion.

deliverables.description: What this role is expected to produce upon task completion.
